title: Payment provider credential failure
symptoms: Payment requests fail with 500 responses, credential validation errors, or missing provider secret messages.
actions: Verify STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and webhook secrets in production.
Compare runtime secrets against the previous successful deployment.
Rollback payments-api if the secret cannot be restored within the incident SLA.

title: Upstream timeout degradation
symptoms: Request latency increases, upstream timeout errors appear, and retries amplify traffic.
actions: Enable degraded mode for non-critical workflows.

title: Database connection pool exhaustion
symptoms: Database timeout errors, high connection count, slow queries, and elevated p95 latency.
actions: Inspect pool usage and slow query logs.
Reduce worker concurrency until the backlog clears.
